label: sandbox_diagnostics • unterminated heredoc surfaces write-file hint
notes: A `cat <<EOF` whose delimiter is never closed makes bash read to end-of-input and warn `here-document … delimited by end-of-file`. The self-heal hint must point at sandbox_write_file for multi-line content instead of a shell heredoc.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr: bash: -c: line 2: warning: here-document at line 1 delimited by end-of-file (wanted `EOF')
